title: Crimes Committed
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(Bounty), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(Fine), 0) AS total FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} crime(s) committed · {total} Cr in fines and bounties incurred
details.help: All CommitCrime events summing fines and bounties generated
